# Milestone Review Template

**Milestone:** Name or description of the milestone  
**Date:** YYYY‑MM‑DD  
**Overview:**  
Summarise what this milestone aimed to achieve.

**Deliverables:**  
List the expected deliverables and whether they were completed.

**Achievements:**  
Highlight the key achievements and progress made.

**Challenges:**  
Describe any challenges encountered and how they were addressed.

**Lessons learned:**  
Capture any lessons or insights gained during this milestone.

**Next steps:**  
Outline what comes next after this milestone.
